positive: A complex, stylized celestial forest scene rendered in the style of deep engraving and Art Deco woodcut print. The central composition features symmetrical, interlocking geometric flora and fauna elements—giant stylized ferns, orbital moons, and cosmic glyphs—forming a cohesive medallion design. The silhouette work must be crisp and highly defined. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, cream, and vibrant gold accents. Achieve dramatic contrast with clean, stark black line work on a solid background. High detail, vector art quality, suitable for screen printing, centered layout, full repeat potential.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, lowres, noise, grain, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly rendered hands, asymmetrical, grunge, photorealistic, gradients, oil painting, logo, signature
